title: Server + shared types: WebSocket server, game loop, room management, physics
description:
Implement the complete server-side of mp-pong per SPEC.md. This includes:

1. **Project setup**: Create package.json, install ws and @types/ws dependencies (use bun).
2. **Shared types** (src/shared/types.ts): Define GameState, all message types (clientâ†’server: join, input, rematch; serverâ†’client: waiting, start, state, score, game_over).
3. **Server entry** (src/server/index.ts): HTTP server that serves static files from src/client/ AND WebSocket server using ws library. Listen on port 3000.
4. **Room management** (src/server/room.ts): Match 2 players into rooms. Handle join, disconnect, rematch flow.
5. **Game loop** (src/server/game.ts): Authoritative 60Hz tick. Ball physics (position, velocity, wall bounce). Paddle movement from input. Collision detection (ballâ†”paddle, ballâ†”walls). Scoring (first to 7 wins). Broadcast GameState to both clients each tick.

Key constants from spec: Canvas 800Ă—600, ball radius 10, paddle 10Ă—80, paddle offset 20 from edge.

File area: src/server/, src/shared/, package.json

title: Client: Canvas renderer, WebSocket connection, input handling, UI
description:
Implement the complete browser client of mp-pong per SPEC.md. This includes:

1. **HTML shell** (src/client/index.html): Page with a canvas element (800Ă—600). Include the compiled JS bundle. Minimal styling (centered, dark background).
2. **Main entry** (src/client/main.ts): Connect to WebSocket server (ws://host:3000). Handle all serverâ†’client message types (waiting, start, state, score, game_over). Send clientâ†’server messages (join, input, rematch). Capture keyboard input: W/S for left paddle, ArrowUp/ArrowDown for right (send input messages on keydown/keyup). Include a simple name prompt or auto-generated name on connect.
3. **Renderer** (src/client/renderer.ts): Canvas 2D rendering. Draw ball (circle, radius 10), paddles (rectangles 10Ă—80), center line, score display. Show waiting screen, game-over screen with winner and rematch option.

Shared types are defined in src/shared/types.ts (owned by server lead). Read them but do not modify. The GameState interface:
```ts
interface GameState {
  ball: { x: number; y: number };
  paddles: { left: { y: number }; right: { y: number } };
}
```

Messages serverâ†’client: waiting, start ({side}), state (GameState), score ({left, right}), game_over ({winner}).
Messages clientâ†’server: join ({name}), input ({up, down}), rematch.

File area: src/client/
